pi_items.source: Found in setup_task.sh where the synthetic candidate's first name is inserted into the ohrm_job_candidate table.
Found in setup_task.sh where the synthetic candidate's last name is inserted into the ohrm_job_candidate table.
Found in verifier.py as the expected_email that the agent must set the employee's work email to.
Found in setup_task.sh where the synthetic vacancy name is inserted into the ohrm_job_vacancy table.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic data where a candidate named Elias Thorne is applying for the Sales Representative vacancy. The verifier strictly checks that the candidate is hired and the new employee's work email is set to elias.thorne@gymhrcorp.com.
